methodology.features: 9-feature point-in-time standings from fixtures table (NO leakage from standings table)
methodology.feature_vector: [h_rank, a_rank, h_gf-h_ga, a_gf-a_ga, h_gf, a_gf, h_ga, a_ga, |h_rank-a_rank|]
methodology.calibration: none (raw probabilities used for EV — same as production V1)
methodology.data_scope: 2025-season FT fixtures (Apr 15–Jun 16 2026 for test, full season for train)
methodology.odds_source: fixture_odds table (pre-match odds stored by odds_poll.py)
